columns.extraction_plan: The document defines secondary endpoints on page 1 and page 3. These include progression-free survival (PFS) and prostate-specific antigen (PSA) level at 7 months, but not a standalone 'Time To PSA progression' (TTPSA) metric. PFS is a composite endpoint that includes PSA progression as one of its components, but TTPSA is not reported separately. I looked in the abstract (page 1), the 'End Points' section (page 3), and the 'Secondary End Points' section (page 4) and did not find this specific metric.

The document defines secondary endpoints on page 1 and page 3. These include progression-free survival (PFS) and prostate-specific antigen (PSA) level at 7 months, but not a standalone 'Time To PSA progression' (TTPSA) metric. PFS is a composite endpoint that includes PSA progression as one of its components, but TTPSA is not reported separately. I looked in the abstract (page 1), the 'End Points' section (page 3), and the 'Secondary End Points' section (page 4) and did not find this specific metric.
